label: PASS
rationale: After a successful Set to Enable true, Done true, DoneOnReset PowerCycle, the successful PowerCycle is a reset event listed in DoneOnReset, so Done must be set false. The Get correctly reports Enable true, Done false, and the stored DoneOnReset value.

label: FAIL
rationale: The trajectory set Done true and DoneOnReset to PowerCycle, then performed a successful PowerCycle. Because DoneOnReset identifies reset types that set Done false, the final Get should not report Done still true.

label: PASS
rationale: The successful Set stored Enable true, Done true, and an empty DoneOnReset set. The evidence says an empty set means the device shall not change Done on any reset, so after PowerCycle the Get correctly preserves Done true and returns the current cells.

label: FAIL
rationale: DoneOnReset was successfully set to the empty set before PowerCycle. Since an empty DoneOnReset preserves Done through any reset, the final Get incorrectly reports Done false instead of the previously set true value.

label: PASS
rationale: DoneOnReset was set only to PowerCycle, and the intervening reset was HardwareReset. Hardware is a distinct reset type, so this reset is not listed in DoneOnReset and Done should remain true; the Get correctly reports Done true with the stored DoneOnReset.

label: FAIL
rationale: With DoneOnReset containing only PowerCycle, a HardwareReset is not a listed reset event. Done should remain true after the reset, so reporting Done false in the final Get is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: ProgrammaticResetEnable was set true, enabling TPER_RESET, and DoneOnReset contains Programmatic. The evidence states TPER_RESET sets MBRControl.Done false when DoneOnReset contains Programmatic, so the final Get correctly reports Done false and the stored DoneOnReset.

label: FAIL
rationale: ProgrammaticResetEnable was successfully set true and DoneOnReset contains Programmatic, so the successful TPerReset is the Programmatic reset event and must set Done false. The final Get incorrectly reports Done true.
